ops.action: Update scope parsing/normalization in `src/agent_loom/memory/scopes.py`, update the supported kinds list in `src/agent_loom/memory/README.md`, and add or extend `tests/test_memory_recall_notes.py` to cover accepted kinds plus unknown-kind handling.
ops.title: Sync scope changes across parser, docs, and recall tests
ops.trigger: When adding or changing Loom memory scope kinds (for example file/folder/command) in memory parsing or recall behavior.

ops.action: Add tests that assert unknown scope kinds are rejected with clear, user-facing errors and that known kinds still parse and round-trip correctly through recall paths.
ops.title: Require explicit unknown-scope failure coverage
ops.trigger: When scope parsing logic changes or a new scope kind is introduced.

ops.action: Run focused tests first (for example `uv run pytest tests/test_memory_recall_notes.py`) to validate behavior quickly, then run full required gates (`uv run basedpyright`, `uv run ruff check .`) before broader test execution.
ops.title: Run targeted memory tests before full quality gates

ops.body:
# Loom Memory Scope Extension

Use this when adding, renaming, or changing memory scope kinds used by recall and note parsing.

## Procedure
1. Define the scope contract first
   - Decide the exact kind names and accepted forms.
   - Decide unknown-kind behavior (must fail clearly).

2. Implement parser/normalization updates
   - Update `src/agent_loom/memory/scopes.py` so new kinds parse and normalize deterministically.
   - Keep normalization rules explicit and minimal; remove dead branches.

3. Align user-facing docs
   - Update supported kinds in `src/agent_loom/memory/README.md`.
   - Ensure examples reflect actual accepted scope syntax.

4. Add high-signal recall tests
   - Extend `tests/test_memory_recall_notes.py` for:
     - recognized kinds (including the new/changed kind),
     - normalization expectations,
     - unknown-kind rejection with clear error text.

5. Run quality gates
   - `uv run basedpyright`
   - `uv run ruff check .`
   - `uv run pytest tests/test_memory_recall_notes.py`
   - Run broader `uv run pytest` when changes could affect other memory paths.

## Done when
- Scope kinds are consistent across parser, docs, and tests.
- Unknown kinds fail explicitly and are covered by tests.
- Type/lint/test gates pass.
ops.description: Procedure for adding or changing Loom memory scope kinds while keeping parser behavior, docs, and recall UX tests aligned.
ops.name: loom-memory-scope-extension
